# Read the file and print its contents and repr to inspect exact characters and indices
path = "/mnt/data/file-QF5YtJAM6s4oS2YWEujWLc-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "rb") as f:
    data = f.read()
text = data.decode("utf-8")
print("CONTENT:\n")
print(text)
print("\n---REPR---\n")
print(repr(text))
len_text = len(text)
print("\nLength:", len_text)

text = open("/mnt/data/file-QF5YtJAM6s4oS2YWEujWLc-text_to_analyse.txt", "r", encoding="utf-8").read()

# Find all substrings enclosed by double quotes in the raw text and show them with context and indices
occurrences = []
for i, ch in enumerate(text):
    if ch == '"':
        # find next closing quote
        j = text.find('"', i+1)
        if j != -1:
            occurrences.append((i, j, text[i+1:j]))
            # continue searching after this
            # but we still record all occurrences
            
print("Found", len(occurrences), "double-quoted segments.")
for start, end, seg in occurrences:
    # show repr of segment and nearby context
    ctx_start = max(0, start-40)
    ctx_end = min(len(text), end+40)
    ctx = text[ctx_start:ctx_end]
    print("Index:", start, end, "Segment repr:", repr(seg))
    print("Context:", repr(ctx))
    print("---")

text = open("/mnt/data/file-QF5YtJAM6s4oS2YWEujWLc-text_to_analyse.txt", "r", encoding="utf-8").read()

for start_quote, end_quote, seg in occurrences:
    if any('\u0600' <= ch <= '\u06FF' for ch in seg):  # contains Arabic char
        ctx = text[max(0, start_quote-30):min(len(text), end_quote+30)]
        print("Quote indices (quote char positions):", start_quote, end_quote)
        print("Segment inside quotes repr:", repr(seg))
        print("Context snippet repr:", repr(ctx))
        print("Exact substring from start_quote to end_quote+1 repr:", repr(text[start_quote:end_quote+1]))
        print("---")

text = open("/mnt/data/file-QF5YtJAM6s4oS2YWEujWLc-text_to_analyse.txt","r", encoding="utf-8").read()

candidates = [
    "لا تحزن إن الله معنا",
    "أنا وأبو بكر في الغار، فوالله ما رأيت رجلاً أحبّني إلى الله من أبي بكر",
    "لا تحزن، إن الله معنا",
    "أهالي الكهف"
]

for s in candidates:
    idx = text.find(s)
    print(repr(s), "found at", idx)
